title: The 20-somethings juggling three jobs to make ends meet
summary: Despite UK unemployment being at a five-year high, an increasing number of young workers are holding multiple jobs to meet living expenses. The trend highlights persistent affordability challenges among the workforce.

zh.title: USA Rare Earth以28亿美元的巴西举措向中国发起挑战
zh.summary: USA Rare Earth以28亿美元收购巴西Serra Verde可能使非中国重稀有金属供应量翻倍。该举措直接挑战了中国在关键材料采购中的主导地位。

title: Major 7.5-magnitude quake hits off Japan, triggers tsunami warnings
summary: A 7.5-magnitude earthquake struck off Japan's coast, triggering tsunami warnings with waves expected to impact northern Honshu. Authorities urged residents in Iwate and Aomori prefectures to seek higher ground.
content: The biggest waves were forecast to hit Iwate and Aomori prefectures at the top of Japan's main Honshu island, authorities said.

zh.title: 日本近海发生7.5级地震，触发海啸警报
zh.summary: 日本近海发生7.5级地震，引发海啸警报，海浪预计将冲击北本州。当局敦促岩手县和青森县的居民撤离到高地。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: American Airlines, Marvell Technology, Strategy & more
summary: Several stocks posted significant premarket movements, including American Airlines and Marvell Technology. The shifts reflect overnight market developments and corporate earnings reactions.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前涨跌幅最大的股票：美国航空、美满科技、Strategy等
zh.summary: 包括美国航空和美满科技在内的多只股票在盘前交易中出现大幅波动。这些变化反映了隔夜市场发展和公司财报反应。

title: SocGen benchmarked the Iran war to every crisis since 1956. Here’s when oil prices return to normal.
summary: Societe Generale analysis comparing Iran conflict to historical crises since 1956 projects oil price normalization by year-end. The forecast provides investors timeline expectations for energy market recovery.
content: Analysts at Societe Generale forecast full normalization to occur toward the end of the year

zh.title: 法国兴业银行将伊朗战争与1956年以来的每次危机进行基准比较，油价何时恢复正常
zh.summary: 法国兴业银行对伊朗冲突与1956年以来历史危机的分析预测，油价将在年底前恢复正常。该预测为投资者提供了能源市场复苏的时间表预期。

title: Kevin Warsh would be the first tech bro Fed chair. How Silicon Valley shaped him
summary: Kevin Warsh, Federal Reserve nominee with deep Silicon Valley ties, brings AI-friendly outlook to central banking leadership. His network includes influential tech entrepreneurs Peter Thiel and Marc Andreessen.
content: The nominee to lead the Fed is an AI optimist who counts tech titans Peter Thiel and Marc Andreessen among his friends.

zh.title: 凯文·沃什将成为首位科技人士联储主席 硅谷如何塑造了他
zh.summary: 凯文·沃什是美联储提名人，与硅谷联系紧密，为中央银行领导层带来友好的人工智能前景。他的人脉包括有影响力的科技企业家彼得·蒂尔和马克·安德森。

title: The narrow foundations of the current rally — one company is responsible for half of S&P 500 earnings revisions
summary: One company accounts for half of all S&P 500 earnings revisions upward since Iran conflict began, revealing narrow rally foundations. The concentration poses downside risk if investor sentiment shifts.
content: Talk about a narrow foundation: one company is responsible for half of the increase in S&P 500 earnings expectations since the Iran war started.

zh.title: 当前反弹的狭隘基础——一家公司负责标普500指数收益上调的一半
zh.summary: 自伊朗冲突开始以来，一家公司占标普500指数收益上调总额的一半，反映了反弹基础狭隘。如果投资者情绪转变，这种集中度会带来下行风险。

title: Buy this cybersecurity stock as agentic AI grows, Barclays says
summary: Barclays upgraded a cybersecurity software company to overweight, citing growth opportunities from agentic AI deployment. The recommendation reflects rising security demands in autonomous systems.
content: The bank upgraded the cybersecurity software stock to overweight from equal weight.

zh.title: 巴克莱建议随着智能体AI增长而购买这只网络安全股
zh.summary: 巴克莱将一家网络安全软件公司升级为增持评级，理由是智能体AI部署带来的增长机遇。该建议反映了自主系统中不断增长的安全需求。

title: Tariff refunds are coming: Here’s who will get them first
summary: Tariff refunds are coming after a Supreme Court decision, offering relief to those who paid duties over the past two months. This affects consumers and businesses that bore the cost of import tariffs.
content: Tariff refunds have been in the works for about two months, following a Supreme Court decision.

zh.title: 关税退款即将到来：谁将首先获得退款
zh.summary: 在最高法院判决后，关税退款即将到来，为过去两个月支付关税的人提供救济。这影响到承担进口关税成本的消费者和企业。

title: 'Resumption of hostilities': seized ship, vessel attacks push U.S.-Iran ceasefire toward brink
summary: U.S.-Iran tensions escalated following the seizure of an Iranian cargo ship and reported vessel attacks in the Gulf, threatening a fragile ceasefire. The conflict risks destabilizing the Middle East and disrupting global energy markets.
content: A U.S. seizure of an Iranian cargo ship and reports of vessels coming under fire in the Gulf have pushed a fragile ceasefire with Tehran to the brink.

zh.title: "恢复敌对行动"：扣押船只、船舶袭击将美伊停火推向悬崖边缘
zh.summary: 在扣押伊朗货轮和波斯湾内报告的船舶袭击事件之后，美伊紧张局势升级，威胁到脆弱的停火。这场冲突存在不稳定中东和破坏全球能源市场的风险。

title: European stocks set to slump as Gulf tanker attacks threaten ceasefire
summary: European stock markets face downward pressure as renewed U.S.-Iran tensions and Gulf tanker attacks threaten regional stability and energy supplies. The geopolitical crisis could trigger broader market volatility across the continent.
content: European stocks are expected to start the new trading week on a somber note as traders assess a re-acceleration in U.S.-Iran tensions.

zh.title: 随着波斯湾油轮袭击威胁停火，欧洲股市面临下跌
zh.summary: 随着美伊紧张局势重新出现和波斯湾油轮袭击威胁地区稳定和能源供应，欧洲股市面临下行压力。地缘政治危机可能会在整个欧洲引发更广泛的市场波动。

title: Debt problems in seaside town among  UK's worst
summary: A British seaside town is struggling with some of the UK's worst debt problems, driven partly by its seasonal job market. The financial crisis reflects broader challenges in coastal communities dependent on tourism.
content: A debt charity believes the town's seasonal job market is in part to blame.

zh.title: 英国海滨小镇陷入英国最严重的债务危机
zh.summary: 英国一个海滨小镇正在经历英国最严重的债务危机之一，这在很大程度上是由于其季节性就业市场所致。这一金融危机反映了依赖旅游业的沿海社区面临的更广泛挑战。

title: Japan's Mitsubishi Heavy Industries sees shares jump nearly 4% on first ever warship export deal
summary: Mitsubishi Heavy Industries' stock jumped nearly 4% on Japan's first-ever warship export deal with Australia, marking a significant shift in the country's defense industry. The first vessel is scheduled for delivery to the Royal Australian Navy in 2029.
content: This will be Japan's first ever warship export project, and the first ship is scheduled to be delivered to the Royal Australian Navy in 2029.

zh.title: 日本三菱重工首次军舰出口交易推动股价上涨近4%
zh.summary: 三菱重工与澳大利亚首次军舰出口交易推动该公司股价上涨近4%，这标志着日本防务产业的重大转变。首艘舰艇计划于2029年交付给皇家澳大利亚海军。

title: How private credit's cracks are threatening to deepen private equity's woes
summary: The $3 trillion private credit market, which fueled global dealmaking over the past decade, is showing signs of strain that are spilling into private equity. These cracks could reduce M&A activity and impact investment returns across the sector.
content: Private credit's rapid rise was key to global dealmaking over the past decade. Now, signs of strain in the $3 trillion market are spilling into private equity.

zh.title: 私人信贷市场裂缝如何加剧私募股权的困境
zh.summary: 在过去十年推动全球并购的3万亿美元私人信贷市场出现了疲软迹象，这些问题正蔓延到私募股权领域。这些裂缝可能会减少并购活动并影响整个行业的投资回报。

title: China keeps benchmark lending rates unchanged as economic growth revs up, Mideast risks loom
summary: China held benchmark lending rates unchanged as strong economic growth reduces the need for additional stimulus, though Middle East geopolitical risks remain a concern. The decision reflects Beijing's view that current momentum is sufficient without monetary easing.
content: The upbeat economic growth has reduced the urgency for fresh stimulus measures, prompting economists to postpone forecasts on the timing of interest rate cuts.

zh.title: 中国在经济增长加速之际保持基准贷款利率不变，中东风险隐现
zh.summary: 中国保持基准贷款利率不变，因强劲经济增长减少了额外刺激政策的需要，尽管中东地缘政治风险仍存在。该决定反映了北京认为当前势头足以支撑经济，无需进一步货币宽松。

title: Asia markets open mixed as U.S.-Iran tensions escalate after ship seizure
summary: The U.S. seizure of an Iranian vessel has escalated Middle East tensions, causing mixed trading conditions across Asia-Pacific markets as investors react to geopolitical risks.
content: Asia-Pacific markets were mixed Monday as a U.S. seizure of an Iranian vessel deepened tensions, keeping investors on edge.

zh.title: 随着船舶扣押事件升级，美伊局势紧张导致亚洲市场开盘走势混合
zh.summary: 美国对伊朗船只的扣押加剧了中东紧张局势，导致亚太地区市场交易状况参差不齐，投资者对地缘政治风险做出反应。
